rulings.Case Title: QING TUAN LI VS. CINDY Q QUON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of P/A
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, MAY 12, 2008 LINE 5. PLAINTIFF QING LI'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint IS GRANTED. BASED ON THE COURT'S UNDERSTANDING OF THE DISPUTES, THE AMENDMENT SIMPLY SUPPLEMENTS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. AS A CONSEQUENCE, THERE WOULD NOT APPEAR TO BE A BASIS TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL MERELY BECAUSE OF THIS AMENDMENT. THERE IS A STRONG PUBLIC POLICY IN FAVOR OF AMENDMENTS WHICH OVERCOMES THE PROBLEMS ARTICULATED BY DEFENDANTS. =(302/PJM/AY)
